Pin Buddy and this window resizes — the wallpaper stays put behind the drawer.

Settings
Celebrate completed tasks
👍🏼 🦜

Off while your system is set to reduce motion.

Pushes other windows out of Buddy's column. Asks for Accessibility permission the first time.

Permission lost after an update. Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Accessibility, remove Buddy with −, then add it back with +.

Sync with iPhone

Tasks are encrypted on this Mac before they sync — Buddy can’t read them.

Scan this in Buddy on your iPhone: Settings → “Scan QR to pair”.

Your iPhone is linked — changes sync automatically.

Off
